title: Multi-Source Summarization
scenario: Write a prompt for an LLM to generate a comprehensive summary of two or more disparate sources on the same topic. The sources will be provided as separate documents, and the LLM should identify key points, reconcile conflicting information, and condense the findings into a 7-sentence summary. The output should be a well-structured and coherent summary with proper citations.
constraints: Must include proper citations for each source

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated summary adheres to the given constraints, including word count, tone, and inclusion of proper citations.
The summary is coherent, conveying the main ideas from multiple sources.
The summary includes accurate and properly formatted citations for each source.
The summary effectively reconciles conflicting information from multiple sources.
